fields.helpText: This field represents patient name in Patient (2) file.  The evaluation/admission record in HBHC Patient (631) file is missing data or contains data inconsistencies.  Field updated by package only, no user input.
This field represents evaluation/admission record in HBHC Patient (631) file.  Field updated by package only, no user input.

This field represents fields to update (actually DR string supplied for DIE call) of evaluation/admission data in HBHC Patient (631) file. Field allows for 1-245 characters of free text.  Field updated by package only, no user input.
